scripts.check: bun run --filter '@cerulia/*' check && bun run --cwd=api check && bun run --cwd=appview verify
scripts.build: bun run --cwd=protocol build && bun run --cwd=api build && bun run --cwd=appview build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd=protocol test && bun run --cwd=api test && bun run --cwd=appview test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd=protocol build && bun run --cwd=api build && bun run --cwd=appview check
